case_title: RANDOLPH M HILL VS. ESQUIVEL GRADING AND PAVING, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING AND PAVING, INC.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO NOV-03-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF RANDOLPH M. HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WSQUIVEL GRADING AND PAVING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TAYLOR ESQUIVEL, CLAIMS MANAGER. THE HEARING IS RECESSED AND PARTIES ARE ASKED TO GO OUT IN THE HALL AND TRY TO COME TO AN AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
